body.purpose: All prose content. 65-75ch max line length.

h1.purpose: Page titles. Used once per page.

code.purpose: Inline code and code block content.

label.purpose: Sidebar section headers, TOC heading, code filenames.

motion.name: ease-default
motion.purpose: Standard state transition easing. Used for all hover and focus transitions.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: Solid dark button used for the 'Get Started' CTA on the landing page.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: #171717; color: #ffffff; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0a0a0b; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #737373; outline-offset: 2px; } .dark .ds-btn-primary { background: #f5f5f5; color: #171717; } .dark .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #e5e5e5; }

components.name: Icon Button
components.description: Square icon button for the header toolbar (theme toggle, search, mobile menu).
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-icon" aria-label="Toggle theme"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="5"/><line x1="12" y1="1" x2="12" y2="3"/><line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="23"/><line x1="4.22" y1="4.22" x2="5.64" y2="5.64"/><line x1="18.36" y1="18.36" x2="19.78" y2="19.78"/><line x1="1" y1="12" x2="3" y2="12"/><line x1="21" y1="12" x2="23" y2="12"/><line x1="4.22" y1="19.78" x2="5.64" y2="18.36"/><line x1="18.36" y1="5.64" x2="19.78" y2="4.22"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; background: transparent; color: #737373; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-icon:hover { background: #f5f5f5; } .ds-btn-icon:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #737373; outline-offset: 2px; } .dark .ds-btn-icon { color: #737373; border-color: #262626; } .dark .ds-btn-icon:hover { background: #262626; }

components.name: Sidebar Link
components.description: Navigation link in the documentation sidebar. Active state uses a filled background.
components.html:
• Hello, World!
  • Basic Template
components.css: .dark nav { background: #0a0a0b; } .dark a { color: #a3a3a3; } .dark a[style*='background'] { background: #262626 !important; color: #fafafa !important; } .dark button { color: #737373; }

components.name: Code Block
components.description: Code block with optional filename header and copy button.
components.html:
HelloWorld.daml
daml 2.0
module HelloWorld

template Hello
  with
    owner: Party
  where
    signatory owner
components.css: .ds-codeblock { border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; } .ds-codeblock-header { display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 8px 16px; background: #fafafa; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; } .ds-codeblock-filename { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: #737373; text-transform: none; } .ds-codeblock-body { padding: 16px; background: #fafafa; overflow-x: auto; } .ds-codeblock-body pre { margin: 0; } .dark .ds-codeblock { border-color: #262626; } .dark .ds-codeblock-header { background: #171717; border-color: #262626; } .dark .ds-codeblock-body { background: #171717; } .dark .ds-codeblock-body pre { color: #a3a3a3; }

components.name: Landing Card
components.description: Section card on the landing page grid. Border-only container with icon, title, and link list.
components.html:
Basics

Core concepts and your first contract

  • Hello, World!
components.css: .ds-card { padding: 20px; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 8px; background: #ffffff; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #d4d4d4; } .dark .ds-card { background: #0a0a0b; border-color: #262626; } .dark .ds-card:hover { border-color: #404040; } .dark .ds-card span { color: #fafafa; } .dark .ds-card a { color: #a3a3a3; }

components.name: Breadcrumb
components.description: Page breadcrumb showing section hierarchy with chevron separators.
components.html: TemplatesBasic Template
components.css: .ds-breadcrumb { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #737373; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-breadcrumb a { color: #737373; text-decoration: none; } .ds-breadcrumb a:hover { color: #404040; } .ds-breadcrumb span { color: #171717; } .dark .ds-breadcrumb { color: #737373; } .dark .ds-breadcrumb a { color: #737373; } .dark .ds-breadcrumb a:hover { color: #a3a3a3; } .dark .ds-breadcrumb span { color: #fafafa; } .ds-breadcrumb svg { width: 12px; height: 12px; color: #737373; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Table of Contents Link
components.description: Sticky sidebar listing page headings with active tracking via IntersectionObserver.
components.html:
On this page

  • Template Structure
  • Template Fields
  • Observers
components.css: .ds-toc { width: 224px; } .ds-toc-heading { margin: 0 0 12px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #737373; } .ds-toc-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-toc-link { display: block; padding: 2px 0; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #737373; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-toc-link:hover { color: #404040; } .ds-toc-active { font-weight: 500; color: #171717; } .ds-toc-indent { padding-left: 12px; } .dark .ds-toc-heading { color: #737373; } .dark .ds-toc-link { color: #a3a3a3; } .dark .ds-toc-link:hover { color: #d4d4d4; } .dark .ds-toc-active { color: #fafafa; }

components.name: Header Bar
components.description: Sticky page header with mobile menu, search, and theme toggle.
components.css: .ds-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; height: 64px; padding: 0 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); } .dark .ds-header { border-color: #262626; background: rgba(10,10,11,0.95); }

components.name: Search Modal
components.description: Full-screen search overlay with input and results list. Triggered by Ctrl+K.
components.html:
ESC
Basic Template
Templates are the foundation of DAML...
Template Fields
Each template has fields that define its data...
components.css: .ds-search-modal { width: 100%; max-width: 512px; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 25px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); overflow: hidden; } .ds-search-input-wrapper { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 0 16px; height: 48px; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e5e5; } .ds-search-input { flex: 1; border: none; background: none; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; color: #171717; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: #a3a3a3; } .ds-search-kbd { flex-shrink: 0; padding: 2px 6px; border: 1px solid #e5e5e5; border-radius: 4px; font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; color: #a3a3a3; display: none; } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-search-kbd { display: inline-block; } } .ds-search-results { max-height: 320px; overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px; } .ds-search-result { display: block; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 8px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-search-result:hover { background: #f5f5f5; } .ds-search-result-title { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #171717; margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-search-result-excerpt { font-family: Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #737373; overflow: hidden; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 1; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; } .ds-search-result-excerpt mark { background: none; color: #171717; font-weight: 500; } .dark .ds-search-modal { background: #171717; border-color: #262626; } .dark .ds-search-input-wrapper { border-color: #262626; } .dark .ds-search-input { color: #fafafa; } .dark .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: #737373; } .dark .ds-search-kbd { border-color: #404040; color: #737373; } .dark .ds-search-result:hover { background: #262626; } .dark .ds-search-result-title { color: #fafafa; } .dark .ds-search-result-excerpt { color: #737373; } .dark .ds-search-result-excerpt mark { color: #fafafa; }

narrative.overview: A clean, methodical reference for DAML developers. Every element earns its place, nothing distracts from the code. The system treats the browser window like a lab bench: lay out your tools, reference the material, get back to building. This design explicitly rejects blog-style layouts (hero images, narrative pull quotes, decorative illustration) and template-generated documentation chrome (Docusaurus/Nextra family resemblance). The interface is custom, deliberate, and invisible in use. Code blocks are the visual center of gravity on every page.
keyCharacteristics: Monochrome with tonal paper stacking as the only depth mechanism. No shadows, no gradients, no glass.
High information density paired with generous vertical rhythm. The reader never scrolls past chrome.
Precision through consistency. The same heading hierarchy, spacing scale, and border treatment on every page.
The accent (solid black or white button) is a single utility tool, not a brand voice. Used on less than 5% of any page.
Developer-first: copy buttons on every code block, keyboard-navigable sidebar, sticky table of contents, Ctrl+K search.

rules.name: The Paper Stack Rule
rules.body: Depth is conveyed exclusively through paper color stacking: white on cold ash on hover ash. No shadows, no elevation. The single exception is the search modal, which uses shadow-2xl.

rules.name: The One Fill Rule
rules.body: Exactly one element on any page uses a filled accent background: the 'Get Started' button on the landing page. Inside doc pages, no element uses it. The accent's rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Single Scale Rule
rules.body: Four type sizes (0.75 / 1 / 1.0625 / 1.25 / 1.875 rem) with two weights (400, 600/700). That is the complete set. No intermediate sizes, no display cut, no italic.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The paper stack provides depth; shadows never do. The single exception is the search modal's interaction layer.

dos: Use the paper stack for depth. Layer white on cold ash on hover ash instead of adding shadows.
Keep code blocks as the most visually prominent element on every doc page.
Use the accent fill exactly once per page at most. Its rarity gives it meaning.
Respect the single scale rule. Four type sizes are enough.
Use transition-colors for state changes. Never animate layout properties.
donts: Use shadows, gradients, glassmorphism, or any decorative effect.
Add hero images, pull quotes, narrative prose, or blog-style layouts.
Use em dashes. Use commas, colons, or periods instead.
Wrap content in cards nested inside other cards. Single-layer paper surfaces only.
Add sidebar stripe borders greater than 1px as accent.
Create the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats).
Reach for a modal as a first solution. Exhaust inline alternatives first.
Increase the type scale. No display cut, no new sizes.
Make the accent button anything but a neutral solid. No colors, no gradients.
